ns0:entry.ns0:title: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
Language: python
FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PostHog/posthog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PostHog/posthog
Language: python
🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tracer-Cloud/opensre
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tracer-Cloud/opensre
Language: python
Build your own AI SRE agents. The open source toolkit for the AI era ✨

URL: https://github.com/Z4nzu/hackingtool
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexzhang13/rlm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexzhang13/rlm
Language: python
General plug-and-play inference library for Recursive Language Models (RLMs), supporting various sandboxes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hugohe3/ppt-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master
Language: python
AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document — real PowerPoint shapes, not images — no design skills needed

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lsdefine/GenericAgent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lsdefine/GenericAgent
Language: python
Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-agents-python
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python
Language: python
A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sansan0/TrendRadar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar
Language: python
⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sgl-project/sglang
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang
Language: python
SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: z-lab/dflash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/z-lab/dflash
